info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP REST API

description.content:
REST APIs for Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP, providing programmatic access to financials, procurement, project management, and risk management capabilities. The API supports viewing and managing financial data including general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, fixed assets, cash management, expense reports, and ERP integrations.

Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Support
 Email: support@oracle.com
